_meta.title: Fungie Talk — Store Call List (SoCal Pokémon TCG)
_meta.notes: Omitted: kiosk-only grocers, all LGS/expensive shops, Lowe's, TJ Maxx, GameStop. stockStatus 'verified' = we know they carry; 'unverified' = cold-call to confirm. shipmentDay/phoneTree/specialInstructions are per-store overrides; null = fall back to chain/category default in app.

retailers.name: CVS — Mulholland Dr (24hr)
retailers.specialInstructions: Checked empty on a prior run. 24-hour store.

retailers.name: Target — Ventura Blvd Woodland Hills
retailers.specialInstructions: Trading cards in a locked case near electronics; scalped fast.

retailers.name: Franklin's Ace Hardware
retailers.specialInstructions: NEW channel — shipments irregular, often arrive ~8 AM. Also stocks NeeDoh. Call to confirm.

retailers.name: HomeGoods — Victory Blvd
retailers.specialInstructions: Sporadic; watch for third-party repacks vs sealed TPCi.

retailers.name: Ross — Fallbrook Ave
retailers.phoneTree: Ask for front-end clerk or manager — cards kept at front registers.
retailers.specialInstructions: Last seen ~2 weeks ago (a customer return). Stock sporadic.

retailers.name: Five Below — Fallbrook Ave
retailers.specialInstructions: Watch for repack mystery boxes vs real sealed product.

retailers.name: Target — Fallbrook Ave
retailers.specialInstructions: Locked card case near electronics; ask associate to open.

retailers.name: Walgreens — Devonshire St Chatsworth
retailers.specialInstructions: Confirmed Friday restock. Open till 11pm.

retailers.name: Five Below — Rinaldi St Porter Ranch
Five Below — Chatsworth St (Granada Hills)
retailers.address: 18040 Chatsworth St Suite A, Granada Hills, CA 91344

retailers.name: Walgreens — Topanga Canyon Blvd
retailers.address: 7560 Topanga Canyon Blvd, Canoga Park, CA 91303
retailers.specialInstructions: Restocks Saturday; gets small + medium tins. Open till 11pm.

retailers.name: Walgreens — Sherman Way (Winnetka)
retailers.specialInstructions: Possible 'Canoga Park Friday store' — confirm this is the Friday-by-noon location.

retailers.name: Big 5 — Topanga Canyon Blvd
retailers.address: 7000 Topanga Canyon Blvd #103, Canoga Park, CA 91303
retailers.specialInstructions: Confirmed: Wed every 2 weeks, gets sleeves + tins. Ask which week the next drop lands.

retailers.name: Hot Topic — Westfield Topanga
retailers.address: 6600 Topanga Canyon Blvd #2106, Canoga Park, CA 91303
retailers.phoneTree: OK to call and check stock; gets frequent shipments.
retailers.specialInstructions: Frequent restocks; call-ahead friendly.

retailers.name: Target — Westfield Topanga
retailers.address: 6700 Topanga Canyon Blvd, Canoga Park, CA 91303
retailers.specialInstructions: 2nd floor. Locked card case.

retailers.name: CVS — Sherman Way Canoga Park
retailers.specialInstructions: Open till ~10pm. Confirmed empty on a prior run.

retailers.name: BoxLunch — Westfield Topanga
retailers.address: 6600 Topanga Canyon Blvd, Canoga Park, CA 91303
retailers.specialInstructions: Pokémon infrequent (~weeks/months apart); occasional tins.

retailers.name: Ross — Victory Blvd Reseda
retailers.phoneTree: Ask for front-end clerk or manager — cards kept at front registers.
retailers.specialInstructions: Best of the three Ross stores — most recent sightings; call any day.

retailers.name: Ross — Ventura Blvd Tarzana
retailers.phoneTree: Ask for front-end clerk or manager — cards kept at front registers.
retailers.specialInstructions: Sporadic; last seen ~a month ago.

retailers.name: Big 5 — Victory Blvd Reseda
retailers.specialInstructions: Big 5 is a confirmed sleeper channel chain-wide; ask restock cadence.

retailers.name: CVS — Victory Blvd Reseda (24hr)
retailers.specialInstructions: Open till midnight.

retailers.name: CVS — Ventura Blvd Tarzana (24hr)
retailers.specialInstructions: 24-hour store.

retailers.name: Barnes & Noble — The Commons at Calabasas
retailers.phoneTree: Ask for the collectibles / front register.
retailers.specialInstructions: Toy/TCG section. Multi-line store — cascade to One Piece if no Pokémon.

retailers.name: CVS — Malibu Rd
retailers.specialInstructions: Only verified-carrier chain in Malibu. No Walgreens/Target/Ross in town.

retailers.name: Ralphs Fresh Fare — Malibu Rd
retailers.specialInstructions: Grocery — cold call to see if a card rack exists.

retailers.name: Pavilions — Heathercliff Rd
retailers.specialInstructions: Grocery — cold call.

retailers.name: CVS — Kanan Rd Agoura Hills
retailers.specialInstructions: TUESDAY restock exception (not the chain Wed/Thu). SCORED Chaos Rising packs + tins here. Open late.
